title: Swaprum - REKT
relevance_summary: Flash loan followed by donateToReserves on lending protocol

prevention.rule: Block any tx that calls donateToReserves() after a flash loan borrow in the same tx

red_flags: Unusual sequence of flash loan and reserve donation
monitoring_rules: BLOCK tx if FLASHLOAN_BORROW -> donateToReserves() in same tx
summary: The attacker used a flash loan to manipulate the lending protocol's reserves, then donated the funds to the reserves, causing a loss. A guard could have blocked such transactions.
